    COALESCE(total_studies, 0) as total_studies,
    COALESCE(study_completion_rate, 0) as study_completion_rate,
    COALESCE(followup_compliance_rate, 0) as followup_compliance_rate,
    COALESCE(total_billed_amount, 0) as total_billed_amount,
    LAG(total_studies) OVER (ORDER BY month_date) as prev_total_studies,
    LAG(study_completion_rate) OVER (ORDER BY month_date) as prev_study_completion_rate,
    LAG(followup_compliance_rate) OVER (ORDER BY month_date) as prev_followup_compliance_rate
FROM SNOREMD_DB.ANALYTICS.MART_CLINIC_MONTHLY_METRICS
WHERE clinic_id = {{ clinic_selector.value }}
AND total_studies > 0
ORDER BY month_date DESC

    p.patient_id,
    p.first_name,
    p.last_name,
    a.appointment_date,
    a.appointment_type
FROM SNOREMD_DB.ANALYTICS.FCT_APPOINTMENTS a
JOIN SNOREMD_DB.ANALYTICS.DIM_PATIENTS p
    ON a.patient_sk = p.patient_sk
JOIN SNOREMD_DB.ANALYTICS.DIM_CLINICS c
    ON a.clinic_sk = c.clinic_sk
WHERE c.clinic_id = {{ clinic_selector.value }}
  AND a.is_completed = TRUE
  AND a.has_follow_up_within_30d = FALSE
ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC
